summary: OIDC missing detection evidence for Issue #21

preflight_check.message: OIDC provider is associated for target EKS cluster.

oidc_missing_failure_path.description: Simulated check for a cluster where OIDC provider is NOT associated (NoSuchEntity from IAM GetOpenIDConnectProvider)

preflight_check.message: OIDC provider is not associated for target EKS cluster.
preflight_check.remediation: Detect+instruct mode (default, no IAM mutation): run `eksctl utils associate-iam-oidc-provider --cluster sparkpilot-no-oidc-cluster --region us-east-1 --approve` in the customer account. Optional automation mode can be explicitly enabled later if desired (SPARKPILOT_PREFLIGHT_AUTOFIX_OIDC_PROVIDER=true).

detection_flow: 1. check_oidc_provider_association() calls eks:DescribeCluster to get OIDC issuer URL
2. Constructs expected IAM OIDC provider ARN from issuer URL
3. Calls iam:GetOpenIDConnectProvider — if NoSuchEntity, returns associated=false
5. Remediation string includes exact eksctl command with cluster name and region

issue_21_acceptance_criteria_coverage.oidc_missing_detected: PASS — check returns status=fail with remediation when OIDC provider absent
issue_21_acceptance_criteria_coverage.remediation_includes_eksctl_command: PASS — eksctl utils associate-iam-oidc-provider command in remediation string
issue_21_acceptance_criteria_coverage.cluster_name_and_region_in_remediation: PASS — cluster name and region interpolated into remediation
issue_21_acceptance_criteria_coverage.detect_only_mode: PASS — no IAM mutations by default
issue_21_acceptance_criteria_coverage.live_cluster_passes: PASS — sparkpilot-live-1 has OIDC configured and check returns pass
